'''ngakoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftproofing|draftproofing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftproofing|draftproofing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngakoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækeheth|ngækeheth]] || [[word:ngækehej|ngækehej]] || [[word:ngækehesh|ngækehesh]] || [[word:ngækehe|ngækehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakokohoth|ngakokohoth]] || [[word:ngakokohoj|ngakokohoj]] || [[word:ngakokohosh|ngakokohosh]] || [[word:ngakokoho|ngakokoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakohoth|ngakohoth]] || [[word:ngakohoj|ngakohoj]] || [[word:ngakohosh|ngakohosh]] || [[word:ngakoho|ngakoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakofhoth|ngakofhoth]] || [[word:ngakofhoj|ngakofhoj]] || [[word:ngakofhosh|ngakofhosh]] || [[word:ngakofhof|ngakofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakohotho|ngakohotho]] || [[word:ngakohojo|ngakohojo]] || [[word:ngakohosho|ngakohosho]] || [[word:ngakohoko|ngakohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakohoth|ngakohoth]] || [[word:ngakohoj|ngakohoj]] || [[word:ngakohosh|ngakohosh]] || [[word:ngakoho|ngakoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakohothol|ngakohothol]] || [[word:ngakohojol|ngakohojol]] || [[word:ngakohoshol|ngakohoshol]] || [[word:ngakohokol|ngakohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakohothotho|ngakohothotho]] || [[word:ngakohojojo|ngakohojojo]] || [[word:ngakohoshosho|ngakohoshosho]] || [[word:ngakohoko|ngakohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakohothon|ngakohothon]] || [[word:ngakohojon|ngakohojon]] || [[word:ngakohoshon|ngakohoshon]] || [[word:ngakohokon|ngakohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakohothoro|ngakohothoro]] || [[word:ngakohojoro|ngakohojoro]] || [[word:ngakohoshoro|ngakohoshoro]] || [[word:ngakohokoro|ngakohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
